text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. It goes beyond simple word recognition to grasp context and meaning, enabling accurate text understanding and translation between languages. Another key application is sentiment analysis, where systems determine whether a piece of writing has a positive, negative, or neutral tone. This is widely used in customer feedback. NLP also powers modern chatbots, allowing them to hold natural conversations and assist users with tasks. As NLP improves, our interactions with technology become more seamless and intuitive.
